description: Base station BS-MUM-042 reporting RSSI of -112 dBm. 3200 subscribers affected in Mumbai North sector.
resolution_steps: Verify antenna alignment via NMS;Check feeder cable integrity;Reboot RRU if alignment nominal

description: Core router NODE-ATL-01 is completely unreachable from NMS since 09:10 UTC. Full sector outage affecting 45000 subscribers.
resolution_steps: Ping node from jump host;SSH to backup management port;Initiate remote power cycle via PDU;Escalate to NOC Tier 2

description: High latency detected on RTR-LON-CORE-03 backhaul link. RTT spiking to 450ms. Baseline is 12ms.
resolution_steps: Check interface utilisation on Gi0/1;Review BGP routing table for path changes;Contact upstream provider if link is saturated

description: OLT-BLR-007 reporting 18% packet loss on downstream PON ports 1-8. 800 FTTH subscribers affected.
resolution_steps: Inspect SFP transceivers on affected ports;Run OTDR trace on fibre plant;Replace degraded SFP module

description: Aggregation switch AGGR-DEL-SW02 uplink port utilisation at 98%. Traffic shaping triggered.
resolution_steps: Redistribute subscriber VLANs across available uplinks;Add QoS policy for critical services;Provision additional uplink capacity

description: eNodeB ENB-CHN-214 reporting power amplifier hardware failure. Cell site completely offline.
resolution_steps: Dispatch field engineer to site;Replace PA module;Run RF calibration post-replacement;Restore cell to service

description: BGP session flapping on RTR-HYD-EDGE01 due to incorrect AS-path prepend configuration pushed in last maintenance window.
resolution_steps: Roll back config to pre-maintenance snapshot;Verify BGP session stability;Re-apply correct prepend config with peer approval

description: BS-PUN-088 sector 2 showing marginal RSRP degradation (-105 dBm). <200 subscribers impacted. Non-critical.
resolution_steps: Schedule antenna tilt optimisation;Monitor RSRP trend over 24h
